description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open-plan interior visible through large glass sliding doors. The exterior is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, wooden fencing, and mature landscaping, including a large leafy tree and a vibrant purple-flowering tree. The backyard area is partially enclosed and includes a small patio space adjacent to the house. The structure has a flat roof and white exterior walls, with expansive windows providing ample natural light. The interior is furnished with a living area, dining space, and bedroom, all arranged for efficient use of space. The property is bordered by wooden fencing, offering privacy and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring mature trees and wooden fencing.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow's rear and side, highlighting the large glass doors, patio area, and both the leafy and purple-flowering trees in the yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front and side of the bungalow, emphasizing the main entrance, living area windows, and the open lawn with visible fencing.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side, focusing on the backyard, wooden fence, and the arrangement of trees and garden elements.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a look at the side and rear, with the large tree dominating the yard and the flat roofline of the bungalow clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
